title: Floral Gooey Comforting Venezuelan Eggs Tart
description: A rich and comforting Venezuelan dish featuring a gooey egg filling, a crumbly gluten-free crust, and a floral touch from the rose petals.

ingredients.name: Gluten-Free All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a high-quality gluten-free flour blend.

ingredients.name: Coconut Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality coconut oil for a flaky crust.

ingredients.name: Non-Dairy Milk
ingredients.notes: Choose a non-dairy milk that suits your taste preferences.

ingredients.name: Rose Petal Jam
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality rose petal jam for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use room temperature eggs for a smooth filling.

ingredients.name: Shredded Coconut
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality shredded coconut for a nice texture.

ingredients.name: Vanilla Extract
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality vanilla extract for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality salt for a nice flavor.

ingredients.name: Granulated Sugar
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality granulated sugar for a nice sweetness.

ingredients.name: Unsalted Almond Butter
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality unsalted almond butter for a creamy filling.

ingredients.name: Dark Chocolate Chips
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality dark chocolate chips for a nice flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Fresh Rose Petals
ingredients.notes: Use edible fresh rose petals for a nice garnish.

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the gluten-free flour, coconut oil, and non-dairy milk. Mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough and place it in a tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a separate bowl, mix together the rose petal jam, shredded coconut, vanilla extract, salt, and granulated sugar.
Add the unsalted almond butter and dark chocolate chips to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture into the tart crust and smooth the top.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Garnish with fresh rose petals and serve warm.
